user.title: Custom Component Monitor
user.description: Set up Custom Component Monitor to track HACS-installed components in your Home Assistant installation.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration is allowed.

init.title: Custom Component Monitor options
init.description: Fine-tune what gets flagged as unused, and optionally let AI summarise and categorise your pending updates.

data_description.exclude: Components that are actually in use but get flagged as unused. Pick from the currently-unused list, or type a name or domain for anything else.
data_description.ai_categorization_enabled: Label each pending HACS update with categories and a one-line summary.
data_description.ai_task_entity: Choose an AI Task entity (Home Assistant 2025.7+) or a Conversation agent. If one doesn't work for your model, try the other.

scan_now.name: Custom Component Monitor: manual scan
scan_now.description: Trigger an immediate scan of all HACS-installed custom components.

update_and_action.name: Update and Add Action
update_and_action.description: Install the HACS update and add a to-do item to track follow-up actions.

entity_id.name: Update Entity
entity_id.description: The update entity to install (e.g. update.my_integration_update).

version.name: Version
version.description: Specific version to install. If omitted, installs the latest version.
